DP.430.0000:
The owner of Amity Square also
owns the Pokémon Mansion!
DP.430.0001:
There are good trees that you can
smear with Honey, and some you can’t.\f
If you want to lure rare Pokémon,
you have to find an attractive tree.
DP.430.0002:
Why, hello there!\f
It’s nice to have an average citizen
say hi to us Policemen!
DP.430.0003:
Patrols day and night...
I’m feeling drowsy... Yawn...
DP.430.0004:
Yo!
Working hard at it, Trainer?
DP.430.0005:
Just between you and me...
I think we’re on patrol too much.
DP.430.0008:
Trainer Tips\f
The items in the Bag can be
reorganized by pressing SELECT.
